name: Spaghettini Portofino
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghettini until al dente. Rinse and drain.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pan over high heat.
3. Add scallops and shrimp to the pan. Sear until shrimp turn white.
4. Stir in garlic and onion, cooking until translucent.
5. Deglaze with wine for two minutes.
6. Add tomato, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 8 minutes.
7. Toss sauce and pasta together. Serve in dishes, garnished with basil leaves.
